Pebble app for testing frame rendering performance and displaying FPS statistics with bitmap image data.


## Files
- **[fps_test.c](fps_test.c.md)**: A Pebble app for testing frame rendering performance and displaying FPS statistics.
- **[test_bitmaps.h](test_bitmaps.h.md)**: Defines static arrays of pixel data and `GBitmap` structures for rendering bitmap images on Pebble smartwatches.
